title: Midas raises $50 million Series A, launches liquidity layer for tokenized assets
message_html: Midas raises $50 million Series A, launches liquidity layer for tokenized assets ...
snippet: Midas raised a $50 million Series A led by RRE and Creandum, and launched a $40 million liquidity facility for tokenized assets.

title: Nium launches dual-network stablecoin card issuance platform
message_html: Nium launches dual-network stablecoin card issuance platform ...
snippet: B2B cross-border payments infrastructure provider Nium has launched a duel-network stablecoin card issuance platform, enabling businesses to spend digital dollars at hundreds of millions of merchant locations worldwide.

title: Trilitech broadens tokenized commodities push on Tezos with Metals.io
message_html: Trilitech broadens tokenized commodities push on Tezos with Metals.io ...
snippet: Trilitech launched a new platform for trading tokenized uranium and metals that are critical for the development of the artificial intelligence industry.
